/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -dynamiclib -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -o libmy_ipc_controller.dylib -install_name @rpath/libmy_ipc_controller.dylib CMakeFiles/my_ipc_controller.dir/my_ipc_controller_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/my_ipc_controller.dir/my_ipc_controller.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib/argos3 /usr/local/lib/argos3/libargos3core_simulator.dylib /usr/local/lib/argos3/libargos3plugin_simulator_genericrobot.dylib /usr/local/lib/argos3/libargos3plugin_simulator_footbot.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libzmq.dylib
